title: Show evolution stats in congress personality cards

log.context: Show evolution stats in congress personality cards

Done. Commit hash: `95f2609`

Here's what was added to `/mnt/data/hello-world/congress.html`:

**CSS** (line 226): `.seat-stats` — 0.6rem font, `var(--text-muted)` color, 75% opacity, small letter-spacing.

**JS helper** `buildStatsEl(p)` (line 1919): reads `p.stats_retained`, `p.stats_evolved`, `p.stats_fired` from the persona object; returns `null` if all are zero or missing (graceful fallback), otherwise returns a `<div class="seat-stats">` with text like `↩ 3 · ✶ 2 · × 1` and a tooltip spell...(truncated)
